outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed near-term (positive GEX 0DTE/WEEKLY), but monthly negative GEX (-12.76B) creates potential for volatility expansion if spot breaks below 6585. Extreme PCR readings (>2.0) signal crowded bearish positioning.
outlook.summary: Market pinned at critical gamma inflection (6620). Spot (6617.5) sits just below 0DTE gamma flip with Max Pain magnet at 6585 creating downside attraction. Near-term dealer hedging will suppress volatility, but extreme bearish skew (1.96) and elevated PCR suggest contrarian bounce potential if 6400 RESONANCE support holds. Watch for directional break from 6620 pivot zone.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE gamma equilibrium point only 2.55 points above spot. Dealers transition from long to short gamma here. Critical inflection where hedging flows reverse direction.
0DTE max pain level 32.5 points below spot. Market maker target zone. Strong magnetic attraction combined with WEEKLY max pain at 6580 creates confluence zone.
RESONANCE across all three expiries: 0DTE (5963 OI), WEEKLY (9120 OI), MONTHLY (25753 OI). Massive structural support with concentrated put gamma. Bears' last line of defense.
RESONANCE across all expiries: 0DTE (7639 OI), WEEKLY (6276 OI), MONTHLY (17936 OI). Major structural resistance. High vol (0.27-0.28) confirms institutional positioning.
CONFLUENCE between 0DTE (18186 OI - largest single strike) and MONTHLY (17613 OI). Deep structural support with extreme put concentration. Break would signal regime change.
CONFLUENCE 0DTE+WEEKLY with consistent call dominance. 0DTE (10658 OI), WEEKLY (9010 OI). Near-term resistance zone above current spot.
0DTE top call wall (10688 OI) near WEEKLY gamma flip (6697.29). Immediate resistance zone. High volume (2279) confirms active trading interest.
WEEKLY gamma equilibrium. Secondary pivot point. Confluence with 6700 call wall creates friction zone for weekly timeframe.
